title: SMPUTILY
description: Utility SMP Modpack is a clean and lightweight modpack made for better SMP and FPS gameplay. It improves performance, visibility, and quality of life without changing vanilla mechanics.
body:
🔧 Utility SMP Modpack – Clean, Smooth & Competitive Gameplay

This Utility SMP Modpack is designed to deliver a better, smoother, and more competitive multiplayer experience without changing the core Minecraft feeling. It focuses on performance, visibility, and quality-of-life improvements, making it perfect for SMP servers, PvP, and FPS-style gameplay.

The modpack is lightweight, clean, and easy to use, so it works well on both low-end and high-end PCs. No unnecessary mods, no clutter — only the features you actually need.

⚡ Performance & FPS Boost

Optimized for higher FPS and stable performance

Reduced lag and smoother gameplay

Ideal for long SMP sessions and PvP fights

🎯 PvP & Combat Enhancements

No Hurt Cam – no screen shake when taking damage

Clear visuals during fights

Better hit awareness and smoother combat experience

🛡️ HUD & UI Improvements

Armor HUD – see armor durability easily

Clean and minimal HUD design

Useful on-screen info without blocking your view

🧰 Quality of Life Features

Faster and smoother inventory interaction

Simple controls and easy configuration

Beginner-friendly, no complex setup required

🌍 Perfect for SMP Servers

Does not change vanilla mechanics

Safe for most SMP servers

Enhances gameplay without giving unfair advantages

****✅ Why Choose This Modpack?

✔ Clean & lightweight
✔ FPS-friendly
✔ SMP-safe
✔ Easy to use
✔ PvP-ready
